title: Remote Access and Network Management Paths · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Provide secure operator, vendor, and user connectivity with recoverable in-band and out-of-band paths. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a least-privilege management access plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare site-to-site and client-to-site VPNs, clientless access, authentication, authorization, and route scope.
Choose split or full tunnel by traffic path, inspection, performance, privacy, DNS, and local-network risk.
Choose SSH, GUI, API, or console management with encrypted transport, identity, least privilege, and logging.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for network access management that tests this competency: Compare in-band and out-of-band management paths and preserve isolated recovery without creating an unmonitored bypass.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Net Inband Outofband trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for compare in-band and out-of-band management paths and preserve isolated recovery without creating an unmonitored bypass.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare in-band and out-of-band management paths and preserve isolated recovery without creating an unmonitored bypass. options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Net Inband Outofband, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Net Inband Outofband record says a complete first version of a least-privilege management access plan while every earlier competency remains active looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Net Inband Outofband without its stated preconditions, omit the a complete first version of a least-privilege management access plan while every earlier competency remains active trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Net Inband Outofband for a complete first version of a least-privilege management access plan while every earlier competency remains active.
